data.title: First Test and Decision Gates
data.description: Run on training subset, evaluate on test subset. Measure accuracy, library size, matching cost. Inspect failure modes for q_07 and q_09 signals. Make hyperedge decision based on evidence.
data.exit_condition: A number exists and q_07 has a documented empirical answer.

gate.pass: Base directed graph substrate is sufficient. Prototype is valid.
gate.fail: Substrate is insufficient. Hyperedge upgrade path warranted.
gate.fail_note: Fail is not throwaway work. Directed graph is hypergraph at k=2. On fail: GOI, layer hierarchy, library structure, GA mechanics, fitness signal, and seed rules all recycle. Seed rules are valid k=2 hypergraph rules — remain valid starting points when substrate is upgraded. Matching engine and rule representations need extension, not replacement.
